TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Germany Itini i 51 00 N, 9 00 E, noYoropi ko Germany. Polong no sekalay i 357,022 sq km "saka 63 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 348,672 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 8,350 sq km " Polong i 80,722,792 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 48%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.80%, malo no roma to a sera 20.20%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 3 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Frank-Walter Steinmeier , patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: *…ôrmanj itini i ** ** n, * ** …ô, no~ujo~uro~upi ko~u *…ôrmanj. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakamo~u…ôt…ôp * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i frank-wa…ĺt…ôr st…ôinm…ôi…ôr , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Germany Itini i 51 00 N, 9 00 E, noYoropi ko Germany. Polong no sekalay i 357,022 sq km "saka 63 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 348,672 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 8,350 sq km " Polong i 80,722,792 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 48%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.80%, malo no roma to a sera 20.20%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 3 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Frank-Walter Steinmeier , patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
